method_summary: Created MLE-bench benchmark using real-world ML engineering tasks from Kaggle competitions, evaluated frontier language models with open-source agent scaffolds against human baselines from Kaggle leaderboards.
key_innovation: MLE-bench benchmark for evaluating ML engineering capabilities of AI agents on real-world tasks
baselines_compared: other frontier language models with various scaffolds
best_result: OpenAI's o1-preview with AIDE scaffolding achieves at least Kaggle bronze medal level in 16.9% of competitions
title: MLE-bench: Evaluating Machine Learning Agents on Machine Learning Engineering
